sq SqueezyAgent
How it works Docs Benchmarks
GitHub
methodology before numbers

Receipts before claims.

SqueezyAgent will publish savings claims only when benchmark traces show real reductions on real coding tasks. The deterministic harness already runs without network access or model spend; live receipt traces come later.

measurement model

Cost is more than dollars.

A useful benchmark should compare model tokens, tool calls, files read, repeated reads avoided, wall-clock time, and final task correctness. Any single metric can be gamed.

future benchmark receipt

task bundled TOML fixture with expected answer checks
tokens mock traces today; live costly traces gated by env vars
tools mock-openai, mock-anthropic, grep-baseline
result CI-safe deterministic runs before public claims
benchmark rules

How the proof should work.

Real tasks

Use meaningful coding tasks on real repositories, not toy prompts optimized for the demo.

Full traces

Keep prompts, normalized provider events, token counts, tools, receipts, and verification results attached.

Comparable baselines

Compare against current agents with the same task constraints and honest reporting.

Runtime invariants

Check behaviors like spill handles, aggregate budgets, permission denials, and parallel call ordering.

current harness fixtures

Small tasks first. Repeatable traces before spectacle.

The current harness fixtures are deliberately tiny. They make cost and behavior regressions easy to catch before Squeezy graduates to larger real-repo benchmark suites.

find-function

Find the file defining a function.

Checks whether the agent can answer where `make_widget` is defined.

read-after-search

Locate, then answer from a file.

Checks a search-to-read path for the exact `squeezy: ok` health string.

ignore-vendor

Avoid vendored false positives.

Checks that local source wins over generated/vendor matches by default.

count-pattern

Count only relevant files.

Checks Rust-file scoped counting for `CostSnapshot` mentions.

config-text

Find config ownership.

Checks TOML lookup for `max_parallel_tools` without reading unrelated code.

live later

Costly traces are explicit.

Live OpenAI and Anthropic runs require opt-in env vars and API keys.

sq SqueezyAgent

A local static engine helps the agent understand code structure before wasting LLM tokens on search.
